description: 4711 Ice Cool Cologne by Muelhens is an aromatic fruity fragrance for men and is a new fragrance introduced in 2008. Top notes are pineapple, violet, privet and bergamot middle notes are plum, peach, mint and lily-of-the-valley base notes are amber, cedar and white musk. Quantity: 150 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
